name: Vinflunine
description: Vinflunine is an ingredient in the EMA-authorised product Javlor.

interactions.name: Clarithromycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Clarithromycin.

interactions.name: Erythromycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Erythromycin.

interactions.name: Telithromycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Telithromycin.

interactions.name: Spiramycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Spiramycin.

interactions.name: Carbomycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Carbomycin.

interactions.name: Josamycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Josamycin.

interactions.name: Kitasamycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Kitasamycin.

interactions.name: Oleandomycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Oleandomycin.

interactions.name: Solithromycin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Solithromycin.

interactions.name: Tylosin
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Vinflunine can be increased when it is combined with Tylosin.

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Vinflunine.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Vinflunine.

interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Vinflunine.

interactions.name: Voriconazole
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Voriconazole is combined with Vinflunine.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Vinflunine.

interactions.name: Acetyldigitoxin
interactions.description: Acetyldigitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Vinflunine.
